author: parithosh
content: <@358120958726373381> how do you do this in lighthouse?

author: arnetheduck
content:
one thing about deposit verification is that afair, you can make the all-happy case 2x faster via batch verification - however, what that means is that the unhappy case becomes 1.5x slower (since you first do a batch which fails, then individually check one-by-one to find exactly which deposits are invalid) .. 
-> this needs worst-case analysis and not just "how do implementations handle the happy case"

author: barnabasbusa
content: yeah we plan to setup happy case and worst case

author: barnabasbusa
content: Just give us a way to verify how long does it take
